name: Market Campaign
description: Standard campaign workflow: research -> strategy + creative -> review

tasks.title: Market Research
tasks.description: Analyze target market, competitors, and audience insights

tasks.title: Ad Strategy
tasks.description: Define ad channels, budget allocation, and targeting strategy

tasks.title: Creative Assets
tasks.description: Produce visual and copy assets for the campaign

tasks.title: Manager Review
tasks.description: Review all deliverables and approve for launch
